markets.question: World Champion
markets.note: Locked pick. Spain won Group H without conceding (4-0 Saudi Arabia, 1-0 Uruguay) after the early 0-0 vs Cape Verde; face Austria in R32. Still leads market and Opta. Unresolved.

markets.question: Top scorer's team
markets.note: Locked pick. France went 3-0 in Group I (10 goals); Mbappé tracking well. Haaland (Norway) and the Brazil front line are the chasers. Unresolved.

markets.question: Group A winner
markets.note: Resolved: Mexico won Group A with a perfect nine points.

markets.question: Group B winner
markets.note: Resolved: Switzerland topped a tight Group B on seven points.

markets.question: Group C winner
markets.note: Resolved: Brazil won Group C, sealed with a 3-0 win over Scotland.

markets.question: Group D winner
markets.note: Resolved: USA won Group D with home advantage.

markets.question: Group E winner
markets.note: Resolved: Germany won Group E (the late 1-2 vs Ecuador came after top spot was secured).

markets.question: Group F winner
markets.note: Resolved: Netherlands topped Group F on seven points after back-to-back wins over Sweden and Tunisia.

markets.question: Group G winner
markets.note: Resolved: Belgium won the wide-open Group G, clinched with a 5-1 rout of New Zealand.

markets.question: Group H winner
markets.note: Resolved: Spain won Group H without conceding after the opening 0-0 vs Cape Verde.

markets.question: Group I winner
markets.note: Resolved: France won Group I with a perfect nine points (10 scored, 2 conceded).

markets.question: Group J winner
markets.note: Resolved: Argentina won Group J with a perfect nine points.

markets.question: Group K winner
markets.note: Resolved: Colombia won Group K on six points; Portugal's 0-0 with Colombia left them second. Pick missed.

markets.question: Group L winner
markets.note: Resolved: England won Group L on seven points, sealed with a 2-0 win over Panama.

markets.question: Reach the semi-finals
markets.note: Locked pick. All four topped their groups (Spain, France and Argentina with full marks) and remain alive in the R32. Unresolved.
